message:
chore: update beads issue tracker and audit index (batches 496-503)

Beads issues: updates status and comments across multiple issues
reflecting concurrent agent progress.

Audit index: 31 new entries across batches 496-503 covering a
security/correctness sweep.  Notable FIXED verdicts:
  - process.rs: zombie process leak on FD wrapping failure
  - postgres.rs: SCRAM timing side-channel
  - tls/connector.rs: empty root cert store bypass
  - dns/resolver.rs: unbounded answer count allocation
  - obligation/recovery.rs: conflict/linearity ordering bug
  - cancel/progress_certificate.rs: NaN propagation in Freedman bound
  - grpc/web.rs: missing grpc-status treated as OK
  - trace/file.rs: oversized event guard missing in compressed paths
  - graded.rs: close state set before success check
  - supervision.rs: backoff restart count ordering
  - pool.rs: dead loop and double-lock in closed cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
